evidences.content: Participants committed $269 million in USDC Launches on The Sui Network"), oversubscribing the sale by 1.43x. Will most participants receive their full MON allocation? Yes. Coinbase confirmed 99% of buyers will receive the full amount requested. What is MON used for within the Monad ecosystem? MON supports governance, staking, network security, and ecosystem development. What comes after the Monad MON Token Sale concludes? USDC $1.00010% [Total Subscription Amount for Monad Token on Coinbase Exceeds $100 Million] The public sale of #Monad tokens on Coinbase is set to end on November 23. According to the official page, the total subscription amount has reached 104 million USDC, while the total available amount is 188 million USDC. The minimum subscription amount per user is 100 USDC, and the maximum is 100,000 USDC. Additionally, Coinbase One members can apply for an additional token allocation ranging from 1.5x to 5x during this Monad token sale and in subsequent sales, depending on their membership tier. evidences.title: Monad Token Presale Surpasses $128M Ahead of Mainnet Launch
evidences.content: The sale is the first direct token offering hosted on Coinbase. It is open to participants in over 80 countries, including the U.S. Early-stage activity was steady but slower than expected. Analysts attribute this to investors waiting for final moments to commit larger funds. Currently, the sale sees an additional $693,500 added each hour. The public sale will close on 23 November at 10:00, just ahead of Monad’s mainnet launch on 24 November 2025. ## What Monad Offers Monad is a high-performance Layer 1 blockchain. It is fully compatible with the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM). It is designed to reach 10,000 transactions per second with near-instant finality. The platform focuses on three core pillars: [...] logo logo facebook facebook telegram telegram twitter twitter linkedin linkedin # Monad Token Presale Surpasses $128M Ahead of Mainnet Launch Clinton Clinton By Clinton google-news google-news Key Takeaways Monad has raised $128.7 million in just over a day through its public token sale on Coinbase. The public sale will remain open until 23 November, ahead of the Monad mainnet launch on 24 November 2025. The sale has reached 68.57% of its $187 million target, with funds cont...

evidences.content: Monad's token sale on CoinbaseCOIN-- attracted 85,000 participants and emphasized organic demand over pre-deposit campaigns. - Strategic hires from traditional finance and crypto infrastructure aim to drive institutional expansion in key Asian markets. - Institutional adoption is a key indicator of confidence in blockchain platforms, and Monad's appointments reflect this trend. Monad's recent token sale on Coinbase marked a significant milestone in the platform's decentralization and institutional adoption strategies. The sale prioritized organic demand, drawing 85,000 participants without traditional pre-deposit campaigns. This approach reflects growing trends in the blockchain sector where transparency and trust are central to attracting a broad user base. evidences.title: Monad public sale total commitments: More than $1B, bet - KuCoin
evidences.content: Would I have joined the sale myself if I could? Yeah, because I still think it has upside potential compared to $2.5b. Unfortunately, I am in Europe and not qualified. [...] Monad public sale total commitments: More than $1B, bet: NO at 58c. Easiest would be to compare it with MegaETH which raised $1,4b at a $1b val, and we have to remember that the valuation is higher, and that the sentiment was better at that time of MegaETH + that the whole Europe is banned from this sale. So far $87m has been raised, and the goal is $187.5m. It will definitely be oversubscribed, but the question is just by how much. The ICO price is closer to the pre-market price, and I think people will be more skeptical about apeing hard. On the bull side for Monad, though they have Coinbase in their back + the sale lasts for 5 more days. Absolutely not a sure bet at all, but IMO it could be worth a try. [...] KuCoin union-icon language_currency source avatar # Share Icon Share Icon Share Icon Share Icon Share Icon Share Icon Copy This is the logo of the coin.

evidences.title: Monad addresses Coinbase token sale slowdown as risk of ...
evidences.content: "In the MON token sale on Coinbase, users get 5 1/2 days to decide whether to commit, and once they commit, they're locked in," Hon also said on Tuesday. "That actually incentivizes people to wait until the last minute to evaluate, which is an interesting dynamic that might be revisited for future sales." If the tokens on offer are not completely sold by the closing date this coming Saturday, "unsold tokens will be reallocated to Ecosystem Development," according to Monad. Coinbase’s new token-sales platform, built after its $375 million Echo acquisition, comes amid what executives describe as the most favorable U.S. regulatory climate for ICOs in years. [...] Compared to another recent token sale, Monad's public offering is underperforming. Last month, MegaETH's public sale was so oversubscribed that despite aiming to raise about $50 million, investors committed over $1.39 billion. Market watchers online have speculated that Coinbase's MON token sale being off limits to European traders may be playing a role in the lackluster sales numbers through Tuesday. Others suggested Monad's tokenomics and past raises may have turned off potential investors. [...] "The purpose of the MON...

evidences.title: Monad (MON) ICO: Complete Guide to the Upcoming Public Token ...
evidences.content: ## Public MON Token Sale: Key Dates and Details Token Sale Dates: Start: November 17, 2025 End: November 22, 2025 Platform: Coinbase Token Sales Token Generation Event and Mainnet Launch: November 24, 2025 (9:00 AM ET | 14:00 UTC) Offering: 7.5 billion MON (7.5% of the total MAX supply of 100 billion) Fixed price: $0.025 per MON token Minimum investment: $100 Maximum investment: $100,000 Available in over 80 countries, including the USA Public Sale Methodology: To ensure fair access and minimize dominance by ‘whales,’ Monad and Coinbase will employ an algorithm that prioritizes smaller requests and retail participants. This prevents single entities from cornering large portions of the allocation at the expense of smaller buyers. [...] ## Final Thoughts The Monad ICO on Coinbase represents a rare opportunity for retail investors to participate in a major layer-1 blockchain at genesis. Its strict anti-whale measures, transparent tokenomics, and high-performance technical architecture differentiate it from prior launches. However, potential investors must conduct their own research and assess their risk tolerance—crypto markets remain volatile, especially for token launches with st...
